title_zh: NVIDIA与日本推动全栈AI与机器人技术应用于各行业
title_en: NVIDIA and Japan Bring Full-Stack AI and Robotics to Every Industry
summary_zh: 作为领先制造商、机器人先驱和基础设施建设者的聚集地，日本是全球AI的重要中心，利用NVIDIA技术构建全栈解决方案。本周，NVIDIA及其日本合作伙伴展示了AI生态系统的最新进展。敬请关注更多更新。
summary_en: Home to leading manufacturers, robotics pioneers, and infrastructure builders, Japan is a global AI hub building full-stack solutions with NVIDIA technologies. This week, NVIDIA and its partners in Japan are showcasing the latest advancements in the AI ecosystem. Check back for updates.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一合作展示了NVIDIA技术与日本产业界的深度融合，推动AI和机器人技术在各行业的广泛应用，彰显日本在全球AI领域的重要地位。
why_it_matters_en: This collaboration highlights the deep integration of NVIDIA technology with Japanese industries, advancing the widespread application of AI and robotics across sectors and underscoring Japan's significant role in the global AI landscape.

why_it_matters_en: By analyzing solutions from thousands of top competitors, key strategies for enhancing AI reasoning were uncovered, offering valuable insights to advance artificial intelligence.

title_zh: Nemotron Labs：开放模型如何赋能企业和国家实现可控、可信且可定制的人工智能
title_en: Nemotron Labs: How Open Models Give Enterprises and Nations AI They Can Trust, Control and Customize
summary_zh: 企业拥有众多强大的模型可供选择，真正的考验在于企业构建的人工智能是否能独特地满足业务需求：优化工作流程，利用领域知识，并超越准确性和可信度标准。
summary_en: Enterprises have plenty of powerful models to choose from. The real test is whether the AI an enterprise builds uniquely addresses the needs of the business: improving workflows, tapping into domain knowledge and exceeding standards for accuracy and trust.
why_it_matters_zh: 本文强调开放模型的重要性，指出只有能够控制和定制的AI才能真正服务企业和国家的具体需求，提高效率和信任度。
why_it_matters_en: This article highlights the importance of open models, emphasizing that AI which can be controlled and customized is essential to meet the specific needs of enterprises and nations, enhancing efficiency and trust.

title_en: How to Run an Autoresearch Workflow with RL Agent Skills and NVIDIA NeMo
summary_zh: 智能编码代理正成为执行长时间机器学习工作流的实用工具，它们能够检查代码库、设置运行环境并解决问题。
summary_en: Coding AI agents are becoming practical operators for long-running machine learning workflows, capable of inspecting repositories, setting up runtimes, and resolving issues.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一进展展示了利用强化学习智能体结合NVIDIA NeMo技术，实现自动化研究流程的可能性，提升机器学习项目的效率。
why_it_matters_en: This advancement demonstrates the potential of combining reinforcement learning agents with NVIDIA NeMo technology to automate research workflows, improving efficiency in ML projects.
